text.title: Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping.

example.scenario: A solo PM runs a Friday grooming pass on 87 backlog items: 12 promoted (4 culled, 8 advanced), 5 marked theme-orphan, h1m frozen at 11 items totalling 18 ideal-days. Owner @ruslan signs.
example.trace: r1-weekly-cadence → r2-every-item-sized-scored → r5-cull-stale → r6-named-owner-per-band → artefact green
